titleStmt.title: SII 39.74: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 74. (A.R. No. 74 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA3rd YEAR 14TH CENTURY A.D.

summary.p: This inscription states the village Māṅguḍi, was sold publicly by the ūrār of Śevūr, to the temple of Tirukkōlakkuḍi-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār. It was set apart to meet the expenses of the shrine of Aḻagapperumāḷ built by one of the tapasvins of the maṭha, in the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrītiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 vatu vru
ccikanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum trayodaśiyun tiruvoṇattu nāḷ puṟamalai nā
ṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyanār Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku Iṉṉāṭṭuc cevūr Ūrāyicaintavaṉa
mutalikaḷum Iṉṉāyanāṟku nilavilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Eṅkaḷāṟṟāmai
yālivvū vudyoṅkaḷ kāṇipaṟṟu māṅkuṭiyai viṟpāṉicaintu koḷviruḷaro Enṟu Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālā
vatu muṟkūṟiya moḻikeṭṭup piṟkūṟikkoḷvenṟa tirukkoḷakkuṭi maṭattilirukkumn tapasvikaḷil
tevarkaḷ tevan Ikkoyilil Aṇiyāntillaiyampalattu Eḻuntaruḷapaṇṇiṉa Aḻaka(r naṭṭa)p perumāḷukki
ṟaiyili (tirunāma)ttukkāṇiyāka viṟka yicainta māṅkuṭiyā perunānkellaiyāvatu
milicainta vilaipporuḷukku vilaikkuṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Āticaṇṭe
śvaratevaṟku cevūrāyicainta Ūrum mutalikaḷu minnilattil (me)ṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiṇ(o)kkiṉa kiṇaṟum nattamun to
ṭṭamuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparappu naṉcey puṉcey nāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nirnilamu maṟṟu yepperpaṭṭaṉavum Emmi
licainta vilaipporuḷukku vilaikkuṟaviṟṟu Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷellām vilaiyāvaṇakkaḷatte kāṭṭi
ṭeṟṟikkaic celavaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaivapramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ati caṇdheśvara tevaṟku cevūr Ūril
mutalikaḷum Immāṅkuṭi vayalukku vanta yiṟaikuṭimai Āḷvari mutalippeṟu cilvari peruvari veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ velikkā
laccup poṉvari Eccoṟuceva maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavun nāṅkaḷe Iṟuppomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkuṭikkā
ṭṭukku Ituve vilaiyāvatākavu mituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭc celavolai yāvutākavu mituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟu
tipporuṭ celavolai kāṇa ṭṭavum kamavutallātākavum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ vilaiyāvaṇakak kaḷattekā
ṭṭeṟṟikkai celakkaik koṇṭu Immāṅkuṭip perunāṉkellaiyum naṭuvun tiruccūlatevarai sthāpittu kal
liluñ cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttom cevūr Ūrum mutalikaḷum pāṭikāval māttālp paṉṉiraṇṭarayum māttāl tū
ṇi nellum kuḷattil miṉum pāṭikāval peṟuvom keṭṭa tiṟuppomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkuṭikkāṭu viṟṟu vilai
pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Aṇiyāratil vilaiyaḻakar naṭṭapperumāḷ Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku cevūr Ūrāvicainta Ūro
mum mutalikaḷu
Ippaṭikku Āḷappiṟanta nāṭaḻvāṉ Eḻuttu
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cuntarapāṇṭiya caṅkaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
